zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Roger Walton於1423年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓時，他的父親Richard Walton26歲，母親Alice De Lutton23歲。他於1465年與Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke在英國亨廷格多史爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Roger Walton于1423年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓时，他的父亲Richard Walton26岁，母亲Alice De Lutton23岁。他于1465年与Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke在英国亨廷格多史爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1505年在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Walton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Walton, which are named with Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala), wald ‘woodland’, wall ‘wall’, or wælla ‘well, spring, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

History: George Walton (1741–1804) signed the Declaration of Independence. He was born in Prince Edward County, VA, whither his grandfather had emigrated from England in 1682. He moved to Savannah, GA, and became governor of GA and a prominent jurist.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Roger Walton was born in 1423, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, his father, Richard Walton, was 26 and his mother, Alice De Lutton, was 23. He married Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke in 1465, in Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1505, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Roger Walton est né en 1423, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Walton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice De Lutton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke en 1465, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1505, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Roger Walton 1423 in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Walton 26 und seine Mutter Alice De Lutton 23. Er hat 1465 in Huntingdonshire, England Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1505 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Roger Walton è nato il nel 1423 nel Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Walton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Alice De Lutton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke nel 1465, nel Huntingdonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1505, nel Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Roger Waltonが1423年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンで生まれた時，父Richard Waltonは26歳，母Alice De Luttonは23歳であった。1465年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアでLady Elizabeth Dunstrokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Roger Walton(이)가 1423년 영국 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Walton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Lutton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 헌틴그도실르에서 Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Roger Walton nasceu em 1423, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Walton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Lutton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke em 1465, em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1505, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Roger Walton родился в 1423 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Walton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Lutton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke в 1465 г. в местности хантингдоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1505 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Roger Walton nació en 1423, en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Walton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice De Lutton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke en 1465, en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1505, en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
